title: MP Research File
description: Per-MP research data for letters project. Updated incrementally by research agents.

researchStatus.description: Overall research status. 'partial' = some info found before timeout/cutoff

postalAddress.description: Electorate office or other postal address for physical letters

status.description: unknown = not yet checked, not-found = checked but none available

source.description: URL or description of where this was found

notes.description: Any relevant context (e.g., 'electorate office, open Mon-Fri')

donationMethod.description: How to donate directly to this MP (not party)

method.description: bank-transfer = direct deposit, website = online form, party-channel = must go via party, none-found = no public method

bankAccount.description: Bank account number if publicly listed

aiInvolvement.description: Has this MP engaged with AI/tech regulation topics?

level.description: none = no evidence found after searching, tangential = mentioned AI/tech in passing, deep = actively engaged

evidence.description: Links and summaries of AI-related statements/actions

notes.description: Context or observations about their tech stance

personalizationNotes.description: Useful hooks for writing a compelling personalized letter (e.g., 'former teacher - frame AI as education issue')

sourcesChecked.description: Audit trail of what was searched - important for distinguishing 'not found' from 'not checked'
